paper_title: Language-Routing Mixture of Experts for Multilingual and Code-Switching Speech Recognition
key_features: Compatible with both monolingual and code-switched ASR
contributions: Computation-efficient LR-MoE architecture suitable for multiple languages with little increase in computational complexity
Investigation of multiple routing strategies with FLR mechanism for language specialization
Improved performance in Mandarin-English code-switching and multilingual experiments with comparable computational efficiency

comparisons.vs_sMoE: Unlike sparsely-gated MoE (sMoE), LR-MoE has language-dependent expert layers
comparisons.vs_previous_MoE: Outperforms previous MoE-based methods with less computational complexity

title: Language-Routing Mixture of Experts for Multilingual and Code-Switching Speech Recognition
